---
title: "Backpacking & Hiking"
format: html
categories: [Some Adventures]
image: pack.png
---
## Peru

<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px;">
  <img src="peru.png" style="width: 400px; height: 400px; object-fit: cover;">
  <img src="machu.png" style="width: 400px; height: 400px; object-fit: cover;">
</div>

<p style="text-align: center;"> 2025: Hiking Machu Picchu!</p>

## Bulgaria Rewilding in Action: Wildland's Field Study Program

<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
  <img src="alpine.png" style="width: 24%; height: 300px; object-fit: cover;">
  <img src="backpacking.png" style="width: 24%; height: 300px; object-fit: cover;">
  <img src="chamois.png" style="width: 24%; height: 300px; object-fit: cover;">
  <img src="julian.png" style="width: 24%; height: 300px; object-fit: cover;">
s</div>

<p style="text-align: center;"> 2024: While backpacking, I studied the coexistence of large carnivores and humans in the Bulgarian mountains.</p>


## Glacier & Olympic National Park

<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
  <img src="mountain.png" style="width: 32%; height: 300px; object-fit: cover;">
  <img src="glacier.png" style="width: 32%; height: 300px; object-fit: cover;">
  <img src="olympic.png" style="width: 32%; height: 300px; object-fit: cover;">
</div>

<p style="text-align: center;"> 2023: Road trip to Oregon, Washington, and Montana.</p>
